mods.text: Require # additional enemies to be Surrounded
mods.note: clipboard prints "Require N fewer enemies to be Surrounded" but trade stores the inverted "additional" stat with a negative value, so more negative is better. prefill 1 measures the exact roll as a MAX bound.

mods.note: chase mod (clipboard roll 2-5 additional Rare Monsters); exact value

mods.text: Unstable Breaches in Map take an additional second to collapse after timer is filled
Breaches in Map have #% increased Pack Size
mods.note: clipboard prints "reduced Pack Size"; trade stores the increased stat with a negative value (drawback)

Wraeclast Besieged.note: stat_list overrides the generic Unique-Tablet all_explicits rule: the two 2-5-range chase mods are the premium signature; the collapse-time and pack-size drawback rows are shown but off. The chase mods have valueless trade text (no # for "an additional ...") but trade2 applies a numeric value filter on them (probe-confirmed: stat_2734787892 min:5 -> 474 vs 1873 unfiltered). tablets.ts adopts the rolled count from advanced-mod data for these stat ids so the prefill:1 can pin the exact roll (issue #417).

Rite of Passage.note: unique Golden Charm (issue #463): rolls exactly one Possessed-by-Spirit line and the spirit variant is the price signature, so all nine per-spirit ids are primary - only the rolled one ever surfaces as a row (probe-confirmed each id returns only Rite of Passage listings). The tenth roll, "Possessed by a random Spirit for 20 seconds on use", is not indexed on trade2, so that variant prices name-only. Duration (10-20s) keeps the default producer bounds.

itemClassRules.note: unique tablets are farming-EV items: every rolled explicit moves price; drawback rolls prefill a max bound

factionRules.note: Aldur's Legacy extracts mods only from non-corrupted Ezomyte/Kalguuran uniques; a corrupted copy is a different market. PARTIAL list (24 confirmed of a ~60 pool); expand from a clean poe2db faction export.
